changes: Added clampThickness(v, min, max) global utility — rounds to integer, clamps to [min, max], safe for all falsy inputs
Added _appearanceJsonSha cache for conflict-safe appearance.json writes
Extended loadStyleTab to also fetch appearance.json and load Tier 2 thickness fields into _styleDraft
Extended _commitDraft to write all 8 thickness fields to users/{uid}/appearance.json with SHA conflict protection
_commitDraft now propagates appearance changes after save via _propagateAppearanceChange
Added styleThicknessSection HTML placeholder div in Style tab
Added loadThicknessSection(uid) function — renders 8 bounded range sliders with live preview (debounced 60ms)
Fixed missing loadParticleSection(uid) call in loadStyleTab (was defined but never wired)

Thickness fields: ringThickness(1-6), nameGlowThickness(2-16), nameOutlineThickness(1-4), bubbleOutlineThickness(0-4), bubbleGlowThickness(2-20), rowOutlineThickness(0-3), badgeOutlineThickness(0-3), profileOutlineThickness(0-4)
